title: Sqlitelogictest wrong NULL value cast
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, value INTEGER, description VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_table (value, description) VALUES (10, 'Test value 1');
INSERT INTO test_table (value, description) VALUES (NULL, 'Test value 2');
SELECT id, value * CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) AS computed_value FROM test_table;
SELECT id, value + (SELECT CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) FROM test_table WHERE id = 1) AS total_value FROM test_table;
key_bug_features: CAST NULL AS INTEGER in SQL query
